title: EF&CC KAWRTHAH LEH KAWRTETHWVENG VC TE BUATSAIHIN AIR RIFLE SHOOTING COMPETITION BUATSAIH A NI
content:
4989/2025-2026

Dated : Mamit the 24th March, 2026:Environment, Forest & Climate Change Department, Kawrthah leh VC Kawrtethawvengte tangkawp chuan Air Rifle Shooting Competition a buatsaih a,Hachhek Constituency huamchhung a mite tana buatsaih niin, competition slogan atan 'Shoot with a Camera, Not a Gun' tih leh 'Aim for peace not the beasts' tih hman a ni. He hun buatsaih chhan hi silai neituten an silai te nungcha tihhlumna atana hmang lova intihhlimna leh competition lian zawk hmachhawn thei tura an inbuatsaih nan a ni.

He hun hi Kawrtethawveng Tennis Court a neih niin competition hi category 2 ah then a ni a,Air Rifle (with scope) leh Air Rifle (without scope) ah te then a ni. Category 1 Air Rifle (with scope) ah hian participants 32 an awm a. Category II Air Rifle (without scope) ah hian participants 33 an awm a ni. Category I & II ah hian lawmman 1-3 thleng leh consolation prize mi 5 te tan lawmman siam a ni bawk.

He hunah hian Pu Karthikeyan V, IFS DFO chuan silai neitute chu nungcha kah nana hmang lova, Ram/Khua ti hmingtha zawnga an thiamnate hmang turin a fuih a. Tin, Kawrtethawveng VC te nen Dillui humhalhna kawngah nasa zawka thawhho an tum thu a sawi. Luidung nungchate tura hrai lo tur te. generator leh dynamo hmanga manlo turte in a chah a. Dan bawhchhia an awm anih chuan dan hmanga hrem an nih tur thu a sawi bawk.

Kawrthah Forest Division chuan intihsiaknaa tel zawng zawngte chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Ramngaw, Nungchate leh Savate humhalhna kawnga nasa lehzuala department hmalaknate thlawp turin mipuite a ngen nawn leh a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZO DIASPORA CELL BULTUMIN ONLINE MEETING BUATSAIH
content:
4988/2025-2026

Aizawl the 24th March 2026:Vawiin khan Mizo Diaspora Cell, Chief Minister Office chuan Mizoram pawna Mizo Welfare leh Association hrang hrangte nena inkawmna (online meeting) an buatsaih a. Mizo Diaspora Cell hnathawh dan leh Mizo DiasporaHub hman tangkai dan tur te an sawiho.

Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Chairman, Mizo Diaspora Cell (MDC), Commissioner & Secretary to CM hovin MDC member-te hi CM Conference Hall-ah an thu a, India ram chhung leh ram pawna awmten online-in an lo zawm a ni.

Pu Vanlaldina Fanai chuan meeting zawmtute hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Welfare leh Association hruaitute chu Mizo DiasporaHub-a inziaklut tura sawmin, sorkar chuan in tana awlsamna tam tak a thlensak beiseiin he Application hi a siam a. Lo in-register theuh turin kan duh che u a, hmang ngei turin tumah kan phut lui lo thung. A hmangtuten in tangkaipui lehzual theih nan a tul anga siam that zel pawh kan inhuam a ni, a ti.

Mizo Diaspora Cell din chhan chu khawvel hmun hrang hranga awm Mizote inhuikhawm a, a tul huna intanpui a ni a. Harsatna tawk, a bik takin ram pawn lama awm mi eng emaw zat kan lo tanpui tawh a, kan tanpui mek bawk a. A tul apiang kan tanpui zel bawk ang a. Mizoram pawna chenghote hlim leh thlamuang taka awm turin kan duh che u a ni, a ti.

DiasporaHub chungchanga hriat duh an neih hrang hrangte hrilhfiah an nih bakah tangkai zawka hman theih dan tur rawtna an neih te an sawi bawk.

title: Mizorama tourist pung zel chungchangah Tourism Department hotute leh Mizoram Synod aiawhte inkawm
content:
4987/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 24th of March, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 2:00 khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State, Tourism Department hovin Tourism Department officer te leh Mizoram Synod aiawhte an inkawm a, Mizoram tlawhtu tourist pung zel lo dawnsawn kawngah thawhho dan tur an sawiho.

Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Mizoram tlawhtu pung zel chu thil lawmawm tak a nih rualin fimkhur taka lo dawnsawn a tul tih a sawi a. “Kum 2025 chhungin tourist nuai 8 chuang an awm a, kuminah a aia tam an awm kan ring. Tourist te hi lo kal belh zel se kan duh a, chutih rualin mi chi hrang hrang lo lut hian thil tha lo ken tel a nei thei a, chung laka lo inven leh dawnsawn kawngah nasa taka zirtirna kalpui a ngai.” a ti a. “Mizoram pawn atanga lo kalte hi a tam ber chu ring lo mi an nih angin, biakin chhung leh a chhehvela awm dan mawi te pawh inzirtir a ngai,” a ti a, kohhran hotute tan pawh ring lote hnena rawngbawlna hun ṭha a inhawn theih thu a sawi.

Mizoram Synod aiawhte pawhin thu sawiin, tourism-a hmalakna langsar tak awm mek chu lawmawm an tih thu an sawi a. Hnamdang min tlawhtute’n nuam ti tak si, kan chenhona leh khawtlang nun zah tak sia hun an hman theihna’n sawrkarin ruahmanna mumal tak neih pawimawh an tih thu an tarlang. Kan ram mawina leh khawtlang nuam tak kan neih – hmeichhiate tan a him, traffic dan zawm tha etc. – te chu Kristianna vanga kan neih a ni tih tarlan pawimawh an tih thu an sawi bawk a ni.

Vawiina inkawmhonaah hian thlasik boruak nuam leh Krismas bawr, tourist tam zual lai chu a hlimhlawp lam bakah Chanchin Țha hrilhna remchanga hman theih tha tih a ni a. Mizoram sawrkarin CAN (Culture, Adventure leh Nature) lam hawiin tourism a kalpui mek thu leh, a bik takin ‘Cultural tourism’ ah, Mizo culture leh Kristianna langsar zawka tarlan kawnga thawhho theih dante uluk taka sawiho a ni.Tourist te’n awlsam taka an chhiar theih turin Mizoram an cham chhunga hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrangte ziak a thehdarh tha tih a ni bawk.

Mizoram tourism in hma a sawn theihna’n kohhran a inhawng a, an tangkai theihna leh sawrkarin a mamawhna zawnah chuan thawhho an duh tih Mizoram Synod aiawhte chuan an sawi a. Sawrkarin kohhran hmalakna tura a beisei hrang hrangte chu inthlahrung hauh lova hrilh thin turin Tourism department hotute an sawm a ni.

Tourism Minister ho hian Council of Churches in Mizoram leh Tourism Department aiawhte chu kumin January 20 khan Mizoram tourism chungchang thlirhoin an lo inkawm tawh a. Kohhran dangte leh NGO dangte nen pawh inrawnkhawmna hi neih zel tum a ni.

Vawiina inkawmhonaah hian Tourism Department atangin Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Commissioner & Secretary; Pi Irene Zohlimpuii Chongthu, Additional Secretary; Pi R. Lalrodingi, Director leh officer dangte an tel a. Mizoram Synod atangin Rev. Dr. K. Lallawmzuala, Executive Secretary bakah Synod Social Front atangin Rev. Lalrinmawia, Pu Lalchhungliana leh Upa Lallianmawia te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Khawzawlah District Consultative Committee Meeting neih a ni
content:
4986/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 24th March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 khan DC Chamber-ah Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana hovin thla thum dana thu thin District Consultative Committee, District Level Review Committee leh District Level Security Committee te an thukhawm.

He meeting-ah hian September-December 2025 chhunga Khawzawl District chhunga Bank hrang hrang te hnathawh leh hmalakna te thlir ho a ni a, Bank hrang hrang ten engtin nge mipui rawng an bawl tih enletna te, hmasawn an ngaihna leh tan an lak zual ngaihna lai te agenda hrang hrang hmanga sawihona neih a ni. Bank vawnhimna kawnga an hmalakna te, pawisa tam zawng an vawn dan te, CD Ratio a that leh that loh te leh scheme hrang hrang - KCC, PMEGP leh PMMY hnuaia loan an pek chhuah dan te an sawi ho a, Potential Linked Credit Plan 2026-2027 Rs. 13196.55 lakh chu a chairman Pu K. Vanlalthiana'n a tlangzarh nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah tung chin dan zir hona buatsaih a ni
content:
4985/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 24:Lunglei District chhunga tung chingtute pualin vawiin khan Lungleia Agricuture Conference Hall-ah tung chin dan zir hona, "Orientation Training for Tung Growers Under NMEO-OS (TBO)" buatsaih a ni.

Training hi Lunglei District Agriculture Officer Dr Samuel Lalliansanga chuan hawngin, tung chin chu a ti tak takte tan ei zawnna tling a nih thu leh State Level-ah pawh policy kalpui mek a nih thu a sawi a. Khawvelah tung ching ram an tlem thu leh China chu a ching tam ber an nih thu sawiin, India ram pawhin tung hriak a mamawh tam ber chu China aṭangin a la lut tih a sawi a. India ram mamawh ringawt pawh a san em avangin tung chin chu hlawkna tham a nih bakah, department pawhin ngaih pawimawh zinga an dah a nih thu a sawi a. Tung chingtute chuan uluk takin ngaihtuahna seng se a duh thu leh ṭanpuina hmuh duh vang ni lovin, mahni intodelh nan leh ramin a mamawhna hre renga ṭhahnem ngaihna tak tak nen hma lak tum se a duh thu sawiin, tung chinna karah thlai hrang hrang sawrkarin a ṭanpui theih ang chi te pawh a chin theih tih hre tur leh Lunglei District anga hming lang tham tura ṭan la turin tung chingtu kal khawmte chu a chah.

He training-ah hian Lunglei District khaw hrang hrang 32 aṭangin tung chingtute an kal khawm a. Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Department, Lungleia mi thiamte'n tung chin dan leh a enkawl dan bakah, a hnu lama hralh chhuah leh sawngbawl dan te zirtirin, zawhna leh chhanna hun hman a ni bawk.

title: Lungleiah World TB Day hman a ni
content:
4984/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 24:Vawiin khan Lungleia Education Complex Conference Hall-ah World TB Day 2026 puala hun hman niin, TB Free Village lawmman sem a nih bakah, Tuberculosis (TB) um bo tura ni 100 chhung beihpui thlak tur, '100 Days TB Campaign' hawn nghal a ni bawk.

He hunah hian Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga chu Khuallian niin, TB chu khawvela natna inkai chhawn theih zinga thihna thlen tam ber pakhat a nih avangin tihtak zeta do a ṭul thu a sawi a. Mizoramah kum tin mi sang 2 chuangin TB natna kan kai tih hriat leh a vei tam zawkte chu ṭhalai lam an ni ṭhin chu a runthlak hle tiin, a dona kawngah ṭan lak nasat a ngai hle tih lantirtu a nih thu a sawi a. TB chu ṭha taka enkawl chuan natna tihdam theih a nih thu sawiin, India sawrkar pawhin a venna leh tihdamna kawngah theih tawp a chhuah thu leh TB natna veite chu a thlawn veka enkawl an nih bakah, ṭanpuina kawng hrang hrang siamsakin, chaw ṭha chi hrang hrang a thlawna pek an nih thu a sawi a. TB natna veite chu thinhrik leh en hrang lovin, an rilru, taksa leh thlarau damna tura ṭanpui leh damdawi ei ṭha tura fuih ṭhin a pawimawh thu sawiin, TB natna dona kawngah mi tin ṭan rual a ṭul thu a sawi a. 100 Days TB Campaign hnuaia TB case awm thei zawng zawng dap chhuah, TB natna lak inven leh TB natna vei mekte tihdam kawnga hma lakna chu hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih a beisei thu sawiin, 100 Days TB Campaign chu a hawng nghal.

Lunglei District Senior Chief Medical Officer (SCMO) Dr Lalrinthangi'n hun kaihruaiin, hun hman chhan leh kal khawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Khual zahawm, Election Officer Pi Lalhruaitluangi pawhin thu sawiin, Lungleia Health & Family Welfare Department hma lakna chu fakawm a tih thu leh District Administration nen pawh thawh hona ṭha tak an neih thu a sawi a. Lunglei District chu Mizorama district lian ber a ni chungin TB natna do kawnga a ti ṭha ber kan ni thei hi thawktute inpekna leh kan zavaia thawh hona rah a ni tiin, TB natna do kawngah kan zavaia kan ṭan rual zel a pawimawh a ni, a ti.

He hunah hian Lunglei District TB Officer Dr K. Lalhmachhuana chuan Lunglei District chhunga TB natna veite dinhmun leh a dona kawnga hma lak dan te, TB Free Village dinhmun te PowerPoint Presentation hmangin a tar lang a. Lunglei District-ah TB Free Village-a puan theih khaw 30 an awm tih tar langin, Lunglei District chu TB natna um bo kawnga thawk ṭha ber a nih thu a tar lang bawk.

Vawiina hun hmanah hian Lunglei District leh Hnahthial District chhunga TB natna um bo kawnga ti ṭha (TB Free Village) khaw 30 te hnenah an thawh ṭhat dan ang zelin lawmman Mahatma Gandhi lim (statue) leh thuziak hlan niin, a zawna kum 3 TB Free khaw 8 hnenah Gold Statue, kum 2 TB Free khaw 4 hnenah Silver Statue leh kum 1 TB Free khaw 18 hnenah Bronze Statue hlan a ni.

Lunglei & Hnahthial District TB Free Village 2025:

Gold: Mualṭhuam North, Sekhum, Ralvawng, Sairep, Ṭhuampui, Kawlhawk, Sertlangpui leh Serte.

Silver: Lunglei Farmveng, South Khawlek, Hnakuksura leh Kawrpuichhuah.

Bronze: Chengpui, Thlengang, Mamte, Sumasumi, Old Sachan, Rualalung, Lungrang South, Lalnutui, Putlungasih, Tuisenchhuah, Belthei, Diblibagh, Chawilung, Nunsury, Puankhai, Bualpui H, Rawpui leh South Chawngtui.

title: SCHOOL TEXTBOOK SEM CHHUAH CHUNGCHANGA DIRECTORATE OF P&S THUCHHUAH
content:
4983/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl the 24th March, 2026 :Academic Session 2026–2027 atana State Council of Educational Research and Training (SCERT)-in a buatsaih School Textbook-te siam leh sem chhuah hna chu a hun takah zawh fel a ni a. SCERT School Textbook siam hna hi Department of Information & Public Relations, Printing & Stationery (IPRP&S) hnuia Directorate of Printing & Stationery kuta awm niin, a ngaihven leh a tihhlawhtlin hna tha takin a hlen chhuak a ni.

He hmalakna hi School Textbook Quality siamthatna kawngah hmalakna thar pawimawh tak a niin Textbook Cover Lamination pawh tih tel chhoh a ni ta a. Hei hi a hmaa tih ngai loh a ni a, a hma aiin a senso sang deuh mahse; zirlaite tana hman tlak leh deih rei zawk tur a a nih avangin; a tangkai hle a ni.

Academic Session 2026–2027 atan Textbook Print Order hi SCERT atangin 2025 kum tawp lamah dawn a ni a. Soft Copy Final chu 2026 kum tîr lamah peih fel a ni. Hetih lai hian Academic Session hun hi April thla atangin March thla ni 23-ah sawn a nih tak avangin, School tan hma ngeia Textbook-te siam zawh hman a tul hle a. Academic Session sawm hma a nih tak avang hian School Textbook a hma lama peihfel tumin Directorate of Printing & Stationery chuan hmalakna chak tak in a la a. Hun chep tak karah Dummy Copy siam, Proof Reading, Correction leh a tul dangte rang taka thawk nghalin, Textbook Print, Binding leh Lamination hna zawng zawng chu Session tan hma ngeiin an zo fel ta a ni.

Academic Session tan hmain Textbook-te hi Samagra leh Textbook Dealer-te hnenah hlan nghal vek a ni a, District zawng zawnga zirlaite hnenah sem a nih theih nan Mizoram chhunga District tinah heng zirlaibute hi thlen hman vek a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM-AH VAIHLO, ZUK LEH HMUAM TI 58.7% AWM MEKIN, INDIA RAM PUMAH PAWH KAN SANG HLE
content:
4982/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 24th March 2026:Vawiin khan State Tobacco Control Cell, National Tobacco Control Programme, National Health Mission buatsaihin “Training of Trainers for Mizoram Government Dental Surgeon” chu DHME Auditorium-ah neih a ni. He training hi Sawrkar hnuaia Dental Surgeon thawk mek te tan a buatsaih a ni. He training-ah hian Dr. Zoramthangi Renthlei, Additional Director (Dental) cum State Nodal Officer, National Tobacco Control Programme chuan hun hi a kaihruai a; Dr. Zonunmawii Pachuau, Additional Director chu Special Guest a ni.

Dr. Zonunmawii Pachuau chuan thu sawiin ‘Global Adult Tobacco Survey (GATS) 2016-17 in a tarlan danin Mizoram chu vaihlo, zuk leh hmuam ti tam lamah India ram pumah kan sang hle a ni’ a ti a, 58.7% in vaihlo zuk leh hmuam ti kan awm thu a sawi. Hemi piah lamah hian Global Youth Tobacco Survey – 4, kum 2019 a neihin a tarlan danin zirlai kum 13 atanga 15 inkar zingah vaihlo zuk leh hmuam hmang mek hi 58% zet an awm bawk a, nu leh pa ten kan fate vaihlo zuk leh hmuam ti lo tura zirtirna kan pek tam hi a pawimawh tak zet a, mi thiamte chuan ruihhlo hman tanna kailawn (Gateway substance) an tih chu vaihlo zuk leh hmuam hi a ni tiin hriselna a khawih chhiat bakah economy thlengin a nghawng thei a ni tihte kan ngaihtuah a hun tawh hle a ni a ti bawk.

Pu R. Lalremruata, State Consultant, NTCP chuan National Tobacco Control Programme hmalakna hrang hang a tarlang a, Hospital tina Doctor-te hnathawh tur leh an tih tur hrang hrangte leh vaihlo sim thei tur a puih dan tur chungchangte a sawi bawk. Pi Vanlalzari, State Legal Consultant kaihhruaiin NTCP in COTPA 2003 te, PECA 2019 (E-Cigarette khuahkhirhna dan) chungchangte zir hona neih a ni bawk. Pu T. Lalbiaksanga, Programme Assistant, NTCP chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

title: SMATEE 2026 Hriattirna
content:
4981/2025-2026

24th March, 2026 :Mizoram State quota Course hrang hrang SMATEE, 2026 hnuaia mi te dil duh tan online registration chu link:dhte.mizoram.gov.inuah hawn mek a ni a. Last date 8th April, 2026 dar 5:00 PM niin Date of exam chu  5th May, 2026 a ni.

title: KUHVA TAWLH LEH DAH THAT CHUNGCHANGA AIZAWL DC THUCHHUAH
content:
4980/2025-2026

Dt March ni 24, 2026:Aizawl District Magistrate Er. Lalhriatpuia chuan a hnuai ami ang hian kuhva tawlh leh dah that chungchanga thupek a siam:

Sawrkar hriatpuina tel lova kuhva phurh te, tawlh te, a dah thatna hmun (godown/kudam) lo siam te hi dân kalh tlat a ni a. Hemi laka Aizawl District mipuite kan inhnamhnawih loh a kan lo him zel theih nan dân lo a kuhva tawlh khapna thupek chhuah a lo ngai leh ta a.

Chuvangin, kei, Er. Lalhriatpuia, IAS, District Magistrate, Aizawl District hian BNSS 2023 Section 163 in thuneihna min pêk angin a hnuaia tarlan ang hian thupêk ka chhuah e:-

"Aizawl District huamchhung ah Sawrkar hriatpuina lovin mi tumahin Kuhva an tawlh in an dah tha tur a ni lo".

He thupêk bawhchhia chu BNS 2023 Section 223 hnuaiah hrem theih an ni ang a. Thupêk hi tihtawi a nih loh chuan, puan a nih atanga thla hnih (2 months) chhûng a huam ang.

Attachment

title: CHAMPHAIAH WORLD WATER DAY & CLOSING OF JAL MAHOTSAV, 2026 HMANG
content:
4979/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 24th March 2026:Nimin dar 2 khan DC Conference Hall Keifangtlangah Observance of World Water Day 2026 leh Jal Mahotsav 2026 kharna hun District Water & Sanitation Mission buatsaihin hman a ni a. Hemi hunah hian Addl. DC Pu James Lalnithanga chu Khuallian niin DWSM member te nen hun hman a ni.

Pi Julie C. Mawii Co-ordinator SBM-G chuan World Water Day 2026 thupui 'Water and Gender’ (Where water flows, equality grows) tih hmangin kalkhawmte hrilhfiahna leh zirtirna hun a nei a, Member Secy, DWSM Er. Jerome Lalremtluanga EE PHED in Jal Mahotsav Campaign chhunga Department hmalakna hrang hrangte report pe in hun a hmang bawk. World Water Day function-ah hian Jal Mahotsav Campaign 2026 kaltlangin Certificate of Recognition category hrang hrangah mi pathum hnenah lawmman Citation leh sum fai hlan a ni a. Er. Vanlallawma Colney, SDO, Khawbung chuan lawmman hlanna hun hi kaihruaiin, lawmman lakna Category hrang hrang te hrilhfiahna hun a hman hnuin Chief Guest in lawmman a hlan a. Lawmman dawng tute chu:

1.Pu Robert Hmingthantluanga, Kelkang (Outstanding Nal Jal Mitra/Rural Water Supply Operator)

2.Pi B Lalramthari, Khawbung Self Help Group (SHG) (Representative for Exceptional Contribution to Rural Piped Water Supply Management)

3.Pu Laldinthara, Zokhawthar (Excellence in Financial Sustainability through Efficient User Charge Collection)

Khuallian Pu James Lalnuthanga chuan Jal Mahotsav Campaign period March Ni 8 atanga March 22, 2026 chhunga neih chu a khar nghal a, World Water Day hmang tura lo kal zawng zawngte chungah lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: East Tuipui bialtu MLA Pu Ramthanmawia'n Vangchhia Haw Runpui khuallian niin a hmanpui
content:
4978/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 24th March 2026:Vawiin khan East Tuipui bialtu MLA Pu Ramthanmawia chuan Vangchhia Haw Runpui Khullian niin a hman pui.

Khuallian Pu Ramthanmawia chuan thusawiin Vangchhia khua in khawchhuak tlang hrang hranga awm tawh te in hmuhkhawmna hun tha tak mai an buatsaih chu tha a tih thu sawiin he hun hian Vangchhia khua leh tuite in unauna ti zual zel se, taksa leh thinlung lamah hmasawnna duhawm tak nei tura a duhsak thu a sawi.

Khuallian chuan "Vangchhia khua chu Mizoram khua te zinga khawhlun leh pawimawh tak mai Pi leh Pute lo thlangtlakna hmasa AD 500 - 1500 vel pawha mi lo khawsak tawhna , Mizo History sawia sawi tel ziah ngai, Pu leh pute sulhnu hlu tak tak te leh Kawtchhuah Ropui awmna, Mizoram khua te zinga Khualzin te tlawh chak ber pawl a ni. " a ti a. Khualzin tam zawk lo dawngsawng thei tura in buatsaih chhoh a tul thu leh Pi leh pute sulhna tha tak a humhalh chhoh zel a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.

Khuallian chuan - Khawtlang hmasawnna tura zirna kawnga tan lak a tul zia te, Ramngaw leh tuihna humhalh tul zia te, Ruihhlo in kan ram leh hnam a tih chhiat nasat zia leh khawtlang tangruala do a tul tawh zia te, Dik taka sum leh pai lak luh a that thu leh sum leh pai lak luh ang ang te khawl nachang hriat a that zia te sawiin Haw Runpui hmang tura kal khawmte a fuih bawk.

Vangchhia khua hi kum 1885 a Sailo Lal Thawmpuia, F Liansuaka leh Neihchungnunga te unau in an sah a ni. Vangchhia khua hi Hualngo leh Vangchhe hnam te a hlawma an lo khawsak tawhna niin kum 141-na a hmang mek a , Chenna In 170 khuaa chhal niin mihring 1000 bawr an khawsa bawk a ni.

Vangchhia Haw Runpui hi March ni 24-26 2026 chhunga hman tur a ni a. Hun khatna vawiin Vangchhia Community Hall a neih hi Pu F Malsawmtluanga Organising Chairman in a kaihruai a, Pu T Lalzuimawia Vice Chairman Organising Committee in inlawmna thu a sawi a, Khuallian Pu Ramthanmawia bakah Lal chhungkua atang te, Vangchhe Hnam atanga te leh Aizawl Welfare te atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni. Special Item hrang hrang bakah Kum 70 chunglam te hnenah lawmpuina hlan a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: Chawngtlaia grape chingtute hnenah KVK Khawzawl leh ICAR-NRC te'n zirtirna pe
content:
4977/2025-2026

Khawzawl, dated 24th March 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 10:30 (Thawhlehni) khan KVK Khawzawl leh ICAR- National Research Centre (NRC) Grapes, Pune tangkawpin Chawngtlai khua-a Grape chingtute hnenah KVK Khawzawl chuan an hmunhma ngeia kalin zirtirna an pe. He hunah Dr. N.A. Deshmuk, Senior Scientist ICAR – NRC for Grape, Pune chuan Grape cut dan dik zirtirna pe – in a telpui bawk a ni. Dr. Malsawmkimi, Senior Scientist KVK Khawzawl chuan he hun hi kaihruaiin Grape mai bakah kan thlai tharchhuah te tun aia hlawk zawka thar thei tura theihtawp kan chhuah a tulzia leh chumi atana tunlai technology hman thiam a pawimiawh zia a sawi.

Dr. Lalngaihawmi, Subject Matter Specialist (Plant Protection) KVK Khawzawl chuan rannung eichhetu laka grape ven dan tur te, natna hrik laka venna tur leh an grape than duhna tur vitamin chungchang te zirtirna a pe a ni. Chawngtlai khua-a grape chingtute hian an grape chawr rual lo hi an harsatna a ni thin a, heng an harsatna ah hian Dr. Deshmuk Senior Scientist Pune chuan a chawr rual theih dan tur chungchangah hian zirtirna a pe bawk. Grape chingtu kalkhawmte nen inkawmkhawmna hun hman nghal niin, kalkhawmte hnenah grape enkawlna atana leitha, rannung thahna hlo leh natna enkawlna tur bakah vitamin te an pekchhuah nghal a ni.

KVK Khawzawl hian TSP (Tribal Sub Plan) hnuaiah Hnahlan leh Chawngtlai khuaa grape chingtute hnenah tun aia hlawk zawka an tharchhuah theih nan theihtawp an chhuah mek a ni.

title: Saitualah District AIDS Prevention and Control Committee thu khawm
content:
4976/2025-2026

Saitual, the 24th March, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin District AIDS Prevention Control Committee chu an thu khawm a, District Level-a AIDS darh zel tur venna leh khuahkhirhna kawnga hmalak zel dan tur kawng hrang hrangte an ngaihtuahho a ni.

Vawiina thutkhawmah hian HIV dona kawnga hma lak dan turte, District Integrated Action plan siam dan turte sawiho niin, Saitual District-a HIV kaite hriat chhuah an nih theihna atan a tam thei ang ber test neih dan tur te sawiho a ni. Heng bakah hian Sub- Hqr YMA-ina April thla tawpa conference an neihna turah awareness campaign neih paha thisen test tura rawtna an siam te, DEO in nu leh pate phalnaa school tina thisen test rawtna chungchang leh kohhran hrang hranga hmalak dan turte sawiho a ni.

Saitual District chuan National AIDS Control Organisation in target pathum a siam te zingah pakhat chu a tihlawhtling tawh a, pahnih dangte pawh December ni 1, 2026 hma ngeia tihlawhtling leh tura hmalak ni se tih an rel bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Pu Srinivas Sadi, Chairperson, DAPCC & DC, Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Member Secretary, DAPCC & Dy. CMO, Pu Tharun Patnaik Madala, SDO (S), Pu Laldingliana, DEO, Dr R Zonunmawii, DPM, DISHA, Aizawl, Dr. Emily Malsawmtluangi, CPO, DISHA, Aizawl, Pu J.Lalrempuia, DIS, Aizawl, Pu Dominic VL Fala, D.A, Disha, Aizawl, Pu VL Hmangaihzauva, PM, Peniel DIC te bakah khawtlang leh kohhran hrang hrang aiawhte an tel a ni.

title: Khawzawlah ni hnih awh tur Training of Child Protection Volunteer neih a ni
content:
4975/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 24th March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 10:30 khan DC Conference Hall, Khawzawlah District Child Protection Unit (DCPU), Khawzawl bultumin ni hnih awh tur 'Child Protection Volunteer Training' neih a ni a, Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana chu khuallian niin a hmanpui.

He hun hi Pu Lallawmpuia, Member, Child Welfare Committee (CWC), Khawzawl chuan kaihruaiin, Pu James Lalthangmawia, District Child Protection Officer (DCPO), chuan inlawmna thu a sawi a. Child Protection Volunteer (CPV) hi District Child Protection Unit (DCPU), Khawzawl in Naupangte venhimna tura kalphung a duan thar niin, CPV ni tur hian Khawzawl District chhunga Village Council tin atangin naupang enkawlna lama mi thahnemngai leh hetiang lama tui, mi hmingtha, tupawh sawm an nih thu leh training hi buaitsaih a nih thu a sawi a ni.

Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan CPV training pawimawh tak buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih hle thu a sawi a. Volunteer te’n naupang leh tleirawlte humhimna kawnga tha thlahloh an ngaih zia sawiin, Mizoram puma harsatna kan tawh thin te chu chenpui/chhungkhat laina, naupang te pawhin an ngainat sa te atang a nih tlangpui thin avangin fimkhur in zirtir thar a tul hle a, humsual dai an awmin a tuartu, naupang rilru kan hriatthiampui tawk thin lo chu pawi a tih thu sawiin, harsatna lo thleng thinte thupbo mai lova dan anga hmalak a tul thu a sawi a. A tuartu, naupangte tan chhawmdawlna tur compensation a awm thute sawiin, rilru dam taka a tuartute an awm theih nan venhim hna thahnemngai zawka thawk a, rilru thianghlim tak pu chunga Volunteer te’n mawhphurhna an neihte hlen zel turin a sawm a ni. Thu a sawi zawh hian Volunteer-te hnenah badge hlanna a nei nghal a ni.

Training ni khatnaah hian Pu James Lalthangmawia, DCPO, R. Lalhmangaihsangi, Legal Cum Probation Officer leh Malsawmsanga, Co-ordinator, Child Helpline Unit – te hnen atangin Mission Vatsalya hrilhfiahna leh Child Protection Volunteer (CPV) te mawhphurhna leh tih tur chungchang te, Naupang te humhimna dan, Juvenile Justice Act, 2015-in naupang, nausen pianghlim atanga kum 18 la tlinglo zawng zawngte humhimna kawng hrang hrangah CPV-te hian DCPU-te nen tangkawpa thawhho dan tur chungchangte leh Hursualna kawnga naupang te'n tawhsual an tawh lohna tura an inven theihna kawng hrang hrangte, thil a lo thlen thulha hmalak dan tur te, hetiang lam hawia che te chu na taka hrem an nih theihna dan te, mitinte fimkhur hle a tulzia te inhrilhhriatna neih niin Volunteer-te chu naupang te tana huaisen taka ding tur an nih ziate hrilhhriatna hun an nei a, Discussion hun hlawk thlak tak hman a ni zui bawk a ni.

title: Minister Pu C. Lalsawivunga'n Champhaiah Livestock Insurance programme a hawng; Bana Kaih hnuaia vaimim chi sem chhuak tur a vai liam
content:
4973/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 24th March 2026:A.H. & Vety. Minister Pu C.Lalsawivunga chuan vawiin khan District Vety. Hospital, Champhaiah National Livestock Mission hnuaia Livestock Insurance programme a hawng a, Mizoram Banakaih kaltlanga ranchaw intodelhna project ‘Maize and Soyabean contract farming for Animal Feed Production’ hnuaia vaimim chi sem tur a vailiam.

Minister Pu C. Lalsawivunga chuan vaimim leinan Department-in sum tam tak a seng thin a, duhkhawp a hmuh thin loh avangin state hrang hrang bakah, Burma atang te a lakluh a nih thin thu a sawi a. Vaimim hi Department in a mamawh reng avang leh market awmsa a nih avangin, Mizo kuthnathawktu te kaltlanga an harsatna te sutkian theih a nih thu a sawi a, he project atan hian Banakaih hnuaiah ₹408 lakhs hmuh a ni a, district pathum Champhai, Saitual leh Khawzawla khaw 10-ah kalpui tum a ni a, loneitu chhungkaw 464 in vaimim tharchhuah runpui an kalpui dawn tih a sawi. Mizoram hi ranvulh atangin kan intodelh thei reng a, intodelh thei turin mi tinin tan kan lak a ngai tih a sawi. Mahni hnaa rinawmna hi a pawimawh em em a, rinawmna hian taimakna te, thawhrimna te leh dikna te a keng tel vek a, kuthnathawktute pawh an hnathawhna apianga rinawmna neia, rinawm taka hna thawk turin a chah a. Bekang leh vaimin an semchhuah te pawh tha taka thar chhuak turin a chah a, Mizoram mipuiin mamawhna sang tak an neih vangin an thawh that chuan an hlawkpui ngei ang tih a sawi bawk. Animal insurance pawh ran vulh te tana thlamuanna siamtu tha tak a ni dawn a, insurance man pangngai aia tlawm daihin an nei thei dawn lehnghal a, an vanneiin an chang tha hle a ni tih a sawi a, an hman tangkei ngei turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Vawiina loneitute tana vaimim chi vailiam zat hi quintal 38.29 a ni a, he project hi kum hnih chhung kalpui tur a niin a tum ber chu ranchaw atana vaimim mamawh mizo loneitute kaltlanga tharchhuah a ni. Department of Agriculture te nena hmalak ho niin vaimim tharchhuah hi A.H. & Vety. Dept chuan Kg ah ₹28 in loneitute kawtkaiah a leisak thin dawn a ni. A.H. & Vety. Dept chuan vaimim hi Deparment feed plant-ah thla tin quintal 500 vel mamawh a nih thin thu an sawi a, he project atang hian quintal 8200 tharchhuah beisei a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhipah Handholding Scheme Workshop neih a ni
content:
4972/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 24th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip DC Pisapui Hall ah District Level Workshop on Handholding Scheme buatsaih a ni a. Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma chu he programme ah hian Chairman niin Mizoram State Policy Coordination Committee (MSPCC) member te leh Handholding Scheme CEO ten hun an hmang a ni.

Workshop-ah hian CEO Pu Lalfakzuala chuan Handholding Scheme chungchang a bulthum atanga chipchiar taka sawiin CM Special Package chu loan la thei dinhmuna ding ve lote tana pek an nih thu leh loan component ah chuan cheng nuai 50 thleng loan dil theih a nih thu a sawi a. Online hmangin englai pawha dil theih a nih thu te, dil hun bi a awm loh thu te, a dawng zat tur bithliah a awm loh thu te a sawi a. Online hmanga dil dan thiam lote tan pawh Serchhip DC Office, SDO leh BDO hrang hrangte Office ah kalin, an tanpui theih reng thu a sawi. Handholding kaltlanga loan hmuh that bikna sawifiahin CEO chuan kum tina Annual Guarantee Fee (AGF) pek ve a ngaih loh thu te, loan rul tha te chu thla 6 hnu zelah an loan laka pung (interest) chu sawrkarin a rulh let leh thin thu a sawi a. A diltu hi kum 18-60 inkar, CIBIL Score 700 aia hniam lo, chhungkaw pakhatah mi pakhat zel tan dil theih a ni.

Kisan Credit Card chungchang sawifiahin CEO Pu Lalfakzuala chuan KCC loan hi loneitu tana duan a nih thu te, cheng nuai 2 chinah dahkham leh guarantor a ngaih loh thu te, loan pung zat 7% atanga 3% chu loan rul tha te hnenah sawrkar laipuiin a pe let dawn, tih te a sawi a. Bana Kaih policy nena kaihkawpa dil thei te chu kum 18-60 inkar an nih a ngai a, Sawrkar Laipuiin 3% a rulh bakah Bana Kaih atangin sawrkarin 4% chu farmer te a rul let dawn a; a pung engmah rulh ngai loin KCC leh Bana Kaih kaihkawp hmang hian farmer ten loan an la thei a ni. KCC loan dil nan document tam tak - entirnan DPR, Qoutation leh a dangte a ngai ve lo a. Loan hi rulh zawh a nih chuan, a tir atanga dilna buaipui that leh ngai lovin kum 5 a ral hmain lak nawn leh mai theih a ni bawk. CEO chuan Bana Kaih hnuaiah KCC dilna hi chak zawka kalpui a nih theih nan ruahmanna siam a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Mizoram State Policy Coordination Committee (MSPCC) member Pu Zohmingthanga leh Pu Lalchhuanawma Hrahsel te pawhin thu sawiin Handholding chu hmalak tak tak tum, kal ngaihna hre si lo te kaihchhuahna tura sawrkar ruahmanna a nih thu an sawi a. Serchhip District ah loan component diltu an la tlem hle a, a tam thei ang berin dil se an duh thu sawiin, line department te pawh Bana Kaih loan diltute dinhmun dik tak zirchiang tur leh progress partner te an hlawhtlin theih nan tanpui turin an chah bawk a ni.

Lead District Manager report-a a lan danin Serchhip District a bank hrang hrangah Bana Kaih hnuaia loan dilna hi 32 a lut tawh a, chung zinga 29 te chu bank in an pawm sak hnuah sanction fel a ni tawh a. Loan an pek chhuah zat belhkhawm hi cheng nuai 288.79 a tling tawh a ni.

Vawiin programme DC Pu Paul L Khuma kaihhruaiah hian SDO (Sadar) Pi Rebecca Laldinmawii Hrahsel, District Monitoring Committee Member Secretary chuan Serchhip District dinhmun report a pe a. Sawrkar official te bakah VC te, progress partner te, bank aiawh te leh mi pawimawh dang te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah One Day Media Workshop "VARTA" buatsaih a ni
content:
4971/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 24th March 2026:Vawiin khan Champhai Press Club-ah Press Information Bureau (PIB), Aizawl bultumin "One Day Media Workshop "VARTA" on Viksit Bharat - Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) and National AIDS & STD Control Programme" tih buatsaih a ni a, Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chu khuallian niin Mizoram Journalists Association (MJA) Champhai President Pu Lalhlupuia chu khual zahawm a ni a, MJA Khawzawl President Pu Lalrotluanga Ralte chu special guest a ni bawk a ni.

Khuallian Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan he hun PIB in a buatsaih thei hi lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, an zirtir tur pawh thil pawimawh tak niin ni 100 inhlawh danglam dan tur leh HIV/AIDS hlauhawm zia leh buaipui dan tur hi mipuiin an hriat ngei a tul thu a sawi a, chanchinbu mite'n mipuiin an hriat ngei theih nan theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a ni.

He hun hi PIB Head of Office Dr. Rajeev Lourembam chuan a kaihruai a, khual zahawm Pu Lalhlupuia leh Pu Lalrotluanga Ralte te'n thu an sawi bawk a ni. G RAM G Act 2025 chungchang DRDO atangin APO Pu Lalengkima'n a sawi a, MGNREGA nena a inan lohna te leh a danglam dan tur hrang hrang, mipui tana hmasawnna awm tur te a sawi a. National AIDS & STD Control Programme chungchang District AIDS Prevention & Control Unit atangin District Programme Manager Pu Lalthlamuana Ralte chuan sawiin HIV leh AIDS awmzia te, inkai chhawn theih dan leh kawng hrang hranga inkai chhawng zat te, Mizoram leh Champhai kai awm zat te leh hriat tur tul hrang hrang a sawi. Resource person te'n thu an sawi zawh hian zawhna leh chhanna hun hlawkthlak tak hman a ni bawk.

title: Serchhipah World TB Day hman a ni
content:
4970/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 24th March, 2026:Vawiin DC Pu Paul L Khuma hovin Serchhip DC Pisapui Hall-ah World TB Day hman a ni a. Kumin thupui hi “Yes! We Can End TB! Led by Bharat, Powered by Janbhagidari” tih a ni.

DC Pu Paul L Khuma chuan TB do hneh tura sawrkar hmalaknaah mipuite kan pawimawhzia a sawi a. TB vei lo tura invenna kawng hrang hrang kan hriat te hi a taka kan nunchhuahpui a tul a, kan lo vei a nih pawhin doctor ten tih tur leh tih loh tur min hrilh kan zawm tur a ni, a ti. Village Council tin te TB Free Village a puan theih tura tang turin DC chuan a fuih a. TB dona beihpuithlak tur hian sawrkar mi leh sa te chauh tih theih a ni lo a, kawng tinrengah VC te an pawimawh a; inchawm tawn a, thawkho tur kan ni, Pu Paul L Khuma chuan a ti a. Kuminah chuan Serchhip District chhunga VC zawng zawngte TB Free Village kan nih theih nan hma i la ang u, tiin kalkhawmte a sawm a ni.

TB Mukt Bharat Abhiyan thawhhnihna chu vawiin hian hawn nghal a ni a. He hmalakna hnuaiah hian Serchhip District chhung khaw tina mi cheng za zelah sawmhnih tal TB an vei leh vei loh endik a ni dawn a. Thuang hniha kalpui tur niin Health Department staff ten an hmanrua nen khaw tin an pan chilh a nga, TB damlo hmuhchhuah tumin thapui an thawh dawn a. A pahnihnaah chuan District Hospital, PHC, CHC, Health & Wellness Centre, sawrkar damdawi in leh clinic zawng zawngah TB damlo zawnchhuah hna thawh a ni anga. Jail, orphanage, HIV hrik pai, natna benvawn vei, zu in leh mei zial zu thin te chu a tam thei ang ber an endik (screen) dawn a ni.

Serchhip District ah hian kuminah TB Free Village a puan 23 an awm a. Gold dawngtu - Hmuntha; Silver dawngtu - Bungtlang, Serchhip Field Veng, Khumtung, Lungpho, Ngentiang, Leng leh Sailulak; Bronze dawngtu - Chhiahtlang North, Buangpui, Chhingchhip Mualpui, Hualtu, Kanghmun South, Khawbel, Lungchhuan, Neihloh, Rullam, Sialhau, Thentlang, Thinglian, Zote South leh Piler te an ni. Gold dawngtu hi kum 3 a zawna TB Free Village a puan ten an dawng a; silver hi kum 2 niin bronze hi kum 1-na ten an dawng a ni.

Vawiin hian TB vei te thian - TB Nikshay Mitra - TB veiten ei leh in hrisel leh chakna tam an dawn theihna tura thla tin cheng 700 a pui thintute hnenah lawmman hlan a ni bawk.

Vawiin Programme hi Senior Chief Medical Officer Dr LP Malsawma’n a kaihruai a. Dr  Lallawmkimi Chhakchhuak, District TB Officer chuan report a pe a. District Medical Superintendent Dr ZD Lalmuanawma’n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: WORLD TB DAY PUALIN HUN HMAN A NI
content:
4969/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 24th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan District TB Centre, Aizawl buatsaihin Taxation Auditorium, MINECO-ah ‘World TB Day’ pualin hun hman a ni a. He hun hi Dr. R. Lalchhuanawma, Mission Director, NHM Mizoram chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui a, ‘100 days TB campaign’ leh ‘TB Mukt Ward’ kalpuina tur a hawng nghal a ni.

Khuallian Dr. R. Lalchhuanawma chuan TB natna hrik hmuhchhuah ni hriatreng nana ‘World TB Day’ hi kumtin hman thin a nih thu a sawi a. Kumin thupui hi mipuite chakna ringa TB natna umbo a nih angin, thawktute, ram hruaitute, vantlang roreltu leh mipuite kan zavaia TB dona kawngah kan thawh theuh chuan TB hi kan umbo thei ngei dawn a ni, a ti a. TB hi a damdawi hmuhchhuah a nih hma chuan natna tihbaiawm tak, thihpui ngei ngei natna, a veite pawh mi ten an thinhrik leh an hlauh em em a ni thin a. Damdawi hmuhchhuah anih hnu leh khawl tha tak tak hmanga rang taka natna hmuhchhuah theih a nih hnu chuan tihdam theih alo ni ta a. TB programme hnuaiah hian thawktuten mipuite kawtkaiah kalchilhin a thlawn vekin TB test-na leh a damdawi te pawh ruahman a ni a, TB veiten an inenkawl chhunga eitur tha an ei theih nan tanpuina thla tin Rs. 1000 an dawn theih thu a tarlang a. Sawrkarlaipuiin a ngaihpawimawh em em pakhat chu mipui atanga TB veite chaw tha hmanga tanpuina pek a nih thu sawiin, Village Council-te pawh an khua-ah TB veite an awm chuan sawrkarlaipuiin min phut angin chaw tha hmanga lo tanpui thin turin a chah a, Gram Panchayat Development Plan-ah TB budget ngaipawimawh turin a ngen bawk a. TB test hi mitinin kan ngaihpawimawha, a natna hmuhchhuah vata, enkawl vat hi kan hneh theihna a ni tih hriain mipuite kan zavaia TB umbo tura tangrual turin a sawm a ni.

Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii pawhin video kaltlangin World TB Day pualin thusawiin, TB hi natna umbo theih a nih thu a sawi a. Sawrkar department hrang hrang, kohhran leh khawtlang thawhhona vangin TB awmlohna khua ‘TB free village’ engemawzat kan nei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. TB do tur chuan tanrual a pawimawh thu sawiin, TB vei inrinhlelhna neite chu test vata, a natna hmuhchhuaha enkawl hi he natna darh zel tur venna pawimawh tak a ni, a ti a. Kan ram atanga TB umbo turin mitinte tanrualpuiah a sawm a ni.

He hunah hian Dr. Zairemmawii, MO, DTC Aizawl chuan Aizawl district chhunga TB report a pe a.

Kum 2025-a Aizawl district chhunga TB dinhmun

1. TB hmuhchhuah zat - 14952. DR- TB hmuhchhuah zat - 1353. TB leh HIV vei kawp hmuhchhuah zat - 1184. Thi - 55 (7%)5. Tihdam zat - 78.41 %

Kum 2025 chhunga Mizorama TB dinhmun

1. TB hmuhchhuah zawng zawng - 22752. MDR- TB hmuhchhuah zat - 1463. TB leh HIV vei kawp hmuhchhuah zat - 2674. TB vanga thi zat - 1455. TB tihdam zat - 84%

Global TB Report 2025-in a tarlan dan chuan kum 2024 khan khawvel pumah mi maktaduai 10.7 (vaibelchhe khat) chuang TB vei an awma, TB vang hian mi maktaduai 1.23 vel an thi a. India TB report 2024-in a tarlan dan chuan India ramah kum 2023-ah mi nuai khat zelah mi 199-in TB natna an vei a, mi nuai khat zelah mi 23 TB vangin an thi a. Mizoramah hian kum 2025 khan TB vei mi 2272 (166 per lakh) hmuhchhuah niin, mi 145 (10 per lakh) TB vangin an thi a ni. TB natna in heti tak maia nunna a la suat nasa hi a pawi em em a. A dona kawngah theihtawpa hma kan lak leh zual hi a pawimawh hle a ni.

TB umbo na tura Sawrkarlaipui ruahman “TB Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan” hnuaiah hian thawktute vak chhuakin TB endikna hi kalpui thin a ni a. Khaw tinah TB vei awlsam bik te chu ngaihpawimawh niin list chhuah vek thin an ni a. A thlawn vekin thawktuten screening an va neihsak thin a. Tin mihring awmkhawm tamna hmun leh TB inkaidarh awlsamna– jail, home etc ah te endikna hi a zing thei ang berin neih a ni bawk.

TB awmlohna khua ni tura in elna thianghlim - TB Free Village tih hi kalpui mek a ni bawk a. Kum 2025 chhung khan Mizoramah TB awmlohna khuaa puan thei khaw 150 lai an awm a. Heng zingah hian khaw 74-te chu kum khat TB Free village ni thei an ni a, khaw 58-te chu kum hnih azawna TB Free Village ni thei an ni a, khaw 18-te chu kum thum chhung TB Free Village ni thei an ni bawk. Aizawl district chhungah hian TB Free Village ni thei khaw 19 lai an awm a. Khaw 4-te hi kum hnih chhung TB Free Village ni zawn thei an ni a.

Vawiinah hian TB veite hnena tanpuina petu a hnuaia tarlante hnenah Nikshay Mitra award hlan a ni a-

1. SEL foundation2. Mizoram Synod3. Dr. B. Lalthantluanga4. Kuriz Collection

Aizawl district chhunga TB Mukt Panchayat (TB free village) award dawng khuate chu – Lamchhip, N.Lungleng,Samtlang, Tawizo, Dilkhan, Thanglailung, Maite, Lenchim, Khanpui, Kepran, Sunhluchhip, Chhanchhuahna, Lamherh, Vanbawng, New Vervek, N Khawdungsei, Khawpuar, Upper Sakawrdai, Hmunnghak.

Aizawl district chhunga TB Mukt Panchayat Silver (kum hnih a zawna TB free village ni thei) award dawng khuate chu – Lamchhip, N. Lungleng, Samtlang leh Khanpui te an ni. Dr. Walter  Lalnuntluanga, Dy. CMO, Aizawl East chuan lawmthu sawiin he hun hi khar a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAIAIH WORLD TB DAY HMAN NIIN '100 DAYS CAMPAIGN'  HAWNNA NEIH NGHAL A NI
content:
4968/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 24th March, 2026 :Tukin zing dar 7:00 AM khan Mizoram State TB Control Society ruahmna angin Lawngtlai Areopagy ah World TB day hmanna leh 100 Days Campaign hawnna neih niin Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan telpuii, Pu C Lalsawmzuala, CEM, LADC chu Khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian Pu C. Lalsawmzuala, CEM, LADC chuan kalkhawmte chibai bukna neiin vawiin hun hman chuan ram hruaina hnathawktu sorkar leh mipui tan rual a pawimawh zia a ti chiang hle a ni, a ti. TB chu hriselna kawng a harsatna lian tak thlentu pakhat a ni a, he ni pawimawh tak ah hian TB umbo kawngah rahbi thar a thlen a beisei tih a sawi a. TB umbo turin LADC pawhin theihtawp a chhuah reng tih tarlangin district administration nen pheikhairual taka ke pen reng a nih thu a sawi a ni. Lawngtlai district chhung atanga TB umbo turin health department kutah engkim dah vek theih a ni lo tiin, VC, NGOs leh Kohhrante nen thawhhona tha tak a awm a tul a ni, a ti.

Khuallian chuan TB chu inven leh enkawl dam theih natna pakhat a nih thu tarlangin, in enkawl hmat leh tha taka damdawi ei chu thil pawimawh hmasa a ni, a ti a. TB natna hmuhchhuah leh enkawlna kawngah duhthu sam lohna tam tak a awm a, chuti chung chuan hmalakna tur hmachhawp tam tak a awm a, Medical infrastructure- te pawh ti changtlun a ngaih thu a sawi. Thawktute inpeknaah lawmthu sawiin, Pu C. Lalsawmzuala chuan TB umbo kawngah tlawmngai pawl leh mipuite thawhpuiah a sawm nghal bawk.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan TB do mekna leh hmalakna kalpuinaah hian thawhhona tha a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti a.District hmasawnna kawngah hriaselna lama hmasawn chu thil pawimawh tak a ni a, a bik takin TB umbo a nih theih nan District Administration pawhin theihtawp a chhuah reng a ni, a ti. TB vei enkawlna, ei in tha an ei theihna turah mamawh khawp sum Central leh State atang hmuh a ni lo a, a pe leh tanpuitu tur chu mipui an ni tiin, sponsorship lawmah harh thar a tul hle tih a sawi a. Bawrhsap chuan '100 Days Campaign' kalpui turah Sawrkar, NGOs,VC leh mipuite in puihtawn a tul hle tiin, thawkho turin a chah nghal a ni.

Pu James Zarzoliana, Senior Treatment Superviser chuan report pe in, nikum a 100 DAYS campaign kalpui anih hnu in Lawngtlai District ah TB vei -15 hmuh chhuah belh niin, Ei leh in that loh avanga TB vei hi a tam ber an ni a ati. India Sorkar in Kum 1960 atang National TB programme a kalpui a, Lawngtlai District ah RNTCP hi 24th March, 2003 ah kalpui tan a ni. Khawvel in 2030 ah TB Umbo turin ruahmanna a siam a, India sorkar in 2025 ah umbo a tum a, mahse a hlawhtling lo a ni a ti. Kum 2019-ah National TB Elimination Programme kalpui leh niin TB veite hnen ah thlatin tanpuina Rs.1000 pek an ni a, tunah dinhmunah mi 30 tanpuitu an awm a ni. 100 Days Campaign- Second phase kalpui a ni leh dawn a, Village zaqng zawngah screening neih vek tur a ni. TB Centre ah hian entik lai pawh in a test thei a ni. Kum 2023-ah TB vei mi 108 awmin, 108 in damna an chang a, Kum 2024-ah TB vei mi-119 awmin mi- 2 in nunna an chan a, mi- 117 in damna an chang a, Kum 2025-ah TB vei mi-162 awmin, mi- 1 in nunna a chan a, mi- 95 damna an chang a, mi-67 enkawl lai an awm a, Kum 2026-ah mi-26 damna chang an awm a ni.

Vawiin World TB Day hmanna ah hian Khuallian chuan '100 Days Campaign'  khuhhawnna a nei a, TB umbo leh enkawlna kawnga Contribution nei thate 'Certificate of Recognition'. hlanna neih niin, Pi Lalrohliri, Thingkah  TB vei damna chang in thusawina tawi a nei bawk. World TB Day hmanna hi Dr.Remlalnghaki, Dy.CMO & District. TB Officer, Lawngtlai chuan kaihhruaiin, Dr. Paul Lalchungnunga, Medical Officer, TB Control, Lawngtlai chuan lawmthu sawina a nei a ni.

Attachment
